facebook.caption:
4.6 stars. 1,044 reviews. La Veranda Resort Phu Quoc - MGallery Collection keeps earning them.

Kayaks at your door. Yoga on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo beach. Mediterranean food that actually delivers. A spa that fixes whatever the flight broke.

This is the resort you book when you're done gambling on mediocre.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
